RS&Co. est. 15 october 2025 ✦
days 180, life flipped 360 ✦
Rads & Sana
officially rs&co. since 15 october 2025 ♡
RS & Co. · Happy 6 ♡
welcome to rs&co. headquarters

I'm not a coder or anything close to a website expert…
this is just my little attempt at doing something for you.

Something that maybe makes you smile a little,
the way you've been doing for me for the past 6 months.

Honestly, I know this isn't perfect… and not even close to the scrapbook
but then again, neither are we, and that's kinda what makes it ours.

6 months of us… and somehow it still feels like I'm just getting started with you.

I didn't expect you to become this important to me,
but now I can't imagine my days without you in them.

Every random conversation, every laugh, every little moment,
we've built something that means more to me than I can explain.

This isn't just a website.
It's us… in pieces, in memories, in moments.

So yeah… this is for you.

I love you, I hope it makes you smile. ♡

internal memo — personal & confidential
a letter
RS&Co. · Internal Correspondence · Confidential · 6 Month Anniversary
myyy babyyy,
180 days… and life has truly been flipped 360 in the best way possible.

i still don't know how to fully put this into words, but i'll try because you deserve that. you really do.

you make me feel so complete. like everything that was missing just… found its place with you. it's in the little things, the way you understand me without me saying much, the way you care, the way you love so effortlessly.

you are kind. you are loving. you are patient in ways i don't even realise sometimes. you are beautiful inside out, like genuinely… the kind of beautiful that goes way beyond looks. and then on top of that, you're actually so pretty it's unfair.

you have this faith in me that i don't even have in myself sometimes. and i swear, the way you believe in me makes me want to take on the whole world. it does something to me… it makes me want to be better, do better, become someone you'll always be proud of.

you're everything i could ever ask for. honestly, even more than that. you're way more than enough, and you always will be.

and then there's the cute things…
my skincare and lip gloss queeeen,
the way you get mad but still care,
the random sugar rush bites,
the way you look at me sometimes and i just melt a little inside.

i know i'm not perfect. there are times i say things i don't mean, times i mess up, times i don't express things the way i should… and i'm really sorry for that.

but one thing i need you to always know is, no matter what, i've always had your best interests at heart. always. even when i get it wrong, even when it doesn't come out right.

thank you for loving me the way you do. thank you for being there, for understanding me, for never judging me, and for choosing me every single time.

these 180 days… it honestly feels like everything just became happier, lighter, better… just because you're in my life.

it still feels like yesterday… taj, liits, all those firsts, and somehow even now, it still feels like
dil maange more.

i don't think i can ever explain how lucky i feel to have you. to be loved by you. to call you mine.

and the best part is… we're just getting started.

i can't wait for everything that's coming. all the memories, the chaos, the random nights, the dreams, the life we're building together.
happy 6 months my love ♡
always yours,
Sanisht
co-founder, rs&co.
